id_requirements: Coursera account; Google certificate credential shared via Credly badge upon completion
exam_rules: No single timed proctored exam. Assessment is embedded across courses: multiple-choice quizzes (≥80% to pass), hands-on labs, peer-reviewed projects, and a capstone project. Learners can retry quizzes up to 3 times per attempt.
renewal_options: Certificates do not expire; no formal renewal required. Google recommends keeping skills current through continued learning.

prerequisites.description: None; no prior design experience required; access to Figma (free) needed

retake_policy.notes: Quizzes can be retaken; no limit on course re-enrolment; learners progress at their own pace

domains.name: UX Foundations (user-centred design, design thinking, UX roles)
UX Research (user interviews, surveys, empathy maps, personas, affinity diagrams)
Wireframing and Prototyping (paper wireframes, digital wireframes in Figma)
Usability Testing and Iteration (moderated testing, synthesis, design iteration)
Responsive Web and Cross-Platform Design (mobile-first, design systems)
Portfolio Projects: 3 end-to-end case studies for job applications

official_study_resources.title: Google Career Certificates — Practice Quizzes (embedded in courses)
Google Career Certificates — Course Readings and Labs
